title: attribution — authorization policies
description: Two policies, one per owned model. Every ability defers to spatie/laravel-permission for the permission check, then layers own-only vs all-in-tenant narrowing. Confidential-field redaction (click IDs, ip_hash) happens at the data-class layer per data-classes.json — the policy authorises access to the ROW; the redactor authorises access to individual FIELDS.

abilities.scope: marketing sees aggregated view (no PII); admin + owner see full rows
narrows to own subject unless caller has attribution.view-all
always allowed for GET /me/attribution — GDPR Art. 15
admin + owner OR the subject themselves via attribution.reset-own
always allowed for the subject's own reset — GDPR Art. 17
Enterprise-only — checked against attribution_merge entitlement + admin + owner role
aggregated data only — no per-subject PII returned even to callers with viewAny
compliance role only — regulatory audit report
audit-critical: every fire notifies the tenant admin + writes an audit row with 7-year retention
marketing: aggregated (no PII); admin + owner: full rows; other roles refused unless viewing own subject's touchpoints
must match parent Attribution.subject_id = auth()->id() OR caller has attribution.view-all
always allowed for the subject's own touchpoint timeline
admin + owner only — surfaces the click_id + device_snapshot fields that are otherwise redacted
